name: resume-tech-equivalence-risk-map
purpose: Measure and control resume-tailoring fabrication for technologies explicitly present in Sri Sai Sarath Chandra Konuru's resume.
critical_warning: This is not a permission slip to fabricate. Treat every non-exact mapping as an auditable hypothesis. Block final export or require human review for unsupported_inference and fabricated claims.
direction: jd_target_index is keyed by the skill found in a job description. candidate_source_skill is the skill actually present in the resume. Use only when candidate_source_skill is confirmed in canonical resume evidence.

exact.meaning: Same technology or same name variant explicitly present in resume.

reworded.meaning: Same claim rewritten without changing substance.

direct_equivalent.meaning: Very close substitute or accepted naming variant; still log it.

adjacent.meaning: Same category or transferable concept, but not the same tool. Reframe, do not swap blindly.

unsupported_inference.meaning: Plausible but not evidenced. Manual review required.

fabricated.meaning: No defensible basis in the resume. Should be blocked from final resume export.
